title: Manufacturing Assistant Engineer
description:
• Provide engineering support to manufacturing equipment and processes
  • Carry out Preventative Maintenance of production equipment
  • Troubleshoot and repair faulty production equipment
  • Improve and upgrading of Production equipment hardware and control (software)
  • Identify and rectify process problems for quality improvement/scrap reduction
  • Updated and control of equipment spare parts
  • Installation and qualification of new processes and equipment Support new program/model start-up
  • Support Production Overtime on weekdays, weekends, Sundays, and Public holidays
  • Minimizing machine downtime, scrap raw materials/products Maintaining correct spare parts inventory and product quality Communicating with production operators/supervisors and other support groups

Requirements

  • At least Diploma in Mechanical / Electrical and Electronic Engineering / Production Engineering / Chemical Processing Engineering
  • Working experience in molding
  • Around 3 years of practical experience
  • Able to work rotating shifts and support OT

Kindly understand that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
